title: poa pratensis var. subglabriflora
intro: Poa pratensis var. subglabriflora, also known as smooth stalk meadowgrass, is a subspecies of the perennial grass Poa pratensis, native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Poa pratensis var. subglabriflora include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity, which can help prevent infections. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for internal use, or applied topically as a salve or poultice for external treatment.
